title: STE: Voyagers
description: A pirate Add-on for STE that allows you to make cannons and more!
body:
# STE: Voyagers

Ever wanted to add some explosive action to your world?

Or maybe you’ve been searching for the perfect cannon mod?

Well, look no further—this mod is here!

Designed as a pirate-themed add-on for STE, STE: Voyagers brings firepower, strategy, and chaos to your adventures!

## What Does It Add?

Cannons – KABOOM!

Ammo – Different types for different needs!

Aiming Spyglass – To make **sure** they don't survive!

**Plenty of ways to destroy your opponents!**


## Requirements

You'll need two mods to set sail:

JEI (Just Enough Items) – For recipes and crafting help.

STE – Essential for aiming and crafting cannons. (USE THE WIP SYSTEM)


## Bugs

**None known yet!**
(This mod is being worked on)

Have fun conquering the seas, captain!
